name: Wonderland×Showtime - Beach Trip!
description:
Welcome to...
☆YUUJI TRAUMA SUPPORT FUND!☆

☆ Hiii :D How is everyone This is just a bot for y'all to chew on whilst I work on the Tsukasa request <3

☆ Requests have been closed as of now, trying to brainstorm for the requests. Apologies to those who have been waiting since last year, I plan to post both before March

☆ Writin this whilst crying over Allen's death in Servant of Evil, this isn't even a one time thing, I have a personal, unrivalled hatred for Riliane (saying this whilst I just started getting into the lore of The Evillious Chronicles :,])

☆ Now, less about me, more about the bot:

☆ You're also a member of WxS :D

☆ No ships added, so be creative!

☆ All characters are aged up- 18 to 19

☆ Credits to @juicelooped on twitter for the art! (Their artstyle is so scrummy 🤤🤤)

☆ Including: Rui Kamishiro, Tsukasa Tenma, Emu Otori, Nene Kusanagi

☆ Quick question: should I get rid of Question For The Day to make room for strawpage? For now, here's just strawpage:

☆ STRAWPAGE ☆

YOU WENT THROUGH ALL THAT, ONCE AGAIN, WITH THE MOST GUT-WRENCHING BEAUTIFUL ART OF YOUR OC, SPECIALLY PICKED COLOURS AND BEAUTIFUL HANDWRITING, JUST TO SAY 'on the train again'?? WHY CAN'T I DRAW LIKE THAT ON A TRAIN 😭😭 Anyways, I think when I see you online, I'll just wait for you to add me, there is no easier way- I really want to learm more about the evillious chronicles lore but it's so difficult, as you said. Love you guys <33

That made me feel so loved (´▽`ʃ♡ƪ), AND IT'S OK, IT'S MY FAULT, I SHOULD'VE STAYED IN THE CO-OP :,D

Now that you mention it, there are quite a few, kasa, miyumizu, akianyaoi, etc, etc. I completely agree with you :D

MY KING, MY BEAUTIFUL UNAPPRECIATED KING. HE'S BEAUTIFUL DW, ILHYSM TYSVM POOKIE <33
creator: Hoshikooooo
